CustomField.description: JSON array of the user's saved board filters. Replaces the per-record DeliverySavedFilter__c custom object — same data, same per-user privacy via the Hierarchy custom setting's SetupOwnerId. Each element shape: { id, label, filterJson, defaultSet, workflowType }. Maintained by DeliverySavedFilterController.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Per-user JSON array of saved board filters.
CustomField.label: Saved Filters JSON
